'''Korenn''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] with spiky, sandy hair who looked younger than his experiences foretold. He was one of [[Crix Madine/Legends|Crix Madine's]] commandos. He died in [[12 ABY/Legends|12 ABY]] when his [[RZ-1 A-wing interceptor/Legends|A-wing]] hit an [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroid]] in the [[Hoth asteroid field/Legends|Hoth asteroid field]] en route to confirm [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] suspicions on the underhanded schemes of [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] gangster [[Durga Besadii Tai]]. A small piece of debris penetrated his rear shields causing loss of altitude control, his engine core to buckle, and slamming his vessel into a jagged asteroid where it burst into flames.

==Appearances==
*[[Darksaber (novel)|''Darksaber'']] {{1st}}
